languages.text: "К сожалению, нет, Лорд-капитан. Гробницы скрыта многочисленными слоями корневой системы Заркова, формирующих надежный щит. Сквозь него мы будем пробиваться в лучшем случае месяцами — если вообще сможем. Последствия для самого Заркова, если у нас получится, и вовсе остаются непредсказуемыми из-за сложной системы переплетения корней. Ауспики прогнозируют массовой обрушение корневой структуры".

"Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure."
languages.original_text: "К сожалению, нет, Лорд-капитан. Гробницы скрыта многочисленными слоями корневой системы Заркова, формирующих надежный щит. Сквозь него мы будем пробиваться в лучшем случае месяцами — если вообще сможем. Последствия для самого Заркова, если у нас получится, и вовсе остаются непредсказуемыми из-за сложной системы переплетения корней. Ауспики прогнозируют массовой обрушение корневой структуры".

It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure.

It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure.

"Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure.

languages.text: 「残念ながら、キャプテン卿。墓はザルコフの根の層に埋もれていて、堅い盾になっています。それを突破するには少なくとも数か月かかるでしょう。もし可能であれば。成功しても、根の複雑な絡み合いによってザルコフ自体に予期せぬ影響が及ぶ可能性があります。私たちの予知能力は、根の構造が崩壊することを予測しています」
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure."

traits.locale_text: 「残念ながら、キャプテン卿。墓はザルコフの根の層に埋もれていて、堅い盾になっています。それを突破するには少なくとも数か月かかるでしょう。もし可能であれば。成功しても、根の複雑な絡み合いによってザルコフ自体に予期せぬ影響が及ぶ可能性があります。私たちの予知能力は、根の構造が崩壊することを予測しています。

languages.text: «Me temo que no, Lord Capitán. Las tumbas están sepultadas por numerosas capas del sistema de raíces de Zarkov, formando un escudo muy resistente. Necesitaríamos meses para atravesarlo, suponiendo que fuera posible en primer lugar, y aunque lo consiguiéramos las consecuencias para Zarkov serían impredecibles debido a la naturaleza entrelazada de las raíces. Nuestros auspexes predicen un colapso total de la estructura».
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure."

traits.locale_text: «Me temo que no, Lord Capitán. Las tumbas están sepultadas por numerosas capas del sistema de raíces de Zarkov, formando un escudo muy resistente. Necesitaríamos meses para atravesarlo, suponiendo que fuera posible en primer lugar, y aunque lo consiguiéramos las consecuencias para Zarkov serían impredecibles debido a la naturaleza entrelazada de las raíces. Nuestros auspexes predicen un colapso total de la estructura».

languages.text: “恐怕不行，舰长大人。扎尔科夫的根系错综复杂，墓穴深埋于层层天然坚壁之下。就算方案可行，想强行打通至少要耗费数月。另据鸟卜仪预测，即便成功，剧烈的震动也可能引发扎尔科夫全球性的根系塌陷，后果不堪设想。”
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure."

traits.locale_text: “恐怕不行，舰长大人。扎尔科夫的根系错综复杂，墓穴深埋于层层天然坚壁之下。就算方案可行，想强行打通至少要耗费数月。另据鸟卜仪预测，即便成功，剧烈的震动也可能引发扎尔科夫全球性的根系塌陷，后果不堪设想。”

languages.text: "Leider nein, Lord Captain. Die Gräber befinden sich unter zahlreichen Schichten von Zarkovs Wurzelsystem, das einen robusten Schild bildet. Es würde Monate dauern, ihn zu durchbrechen ... sofern das überhaupt möglich ist. Und selbst wenn es uns gelingt, bleiben die Konsequenzen für Zarkov aufgrund der Komplexität des Wurzelsystems unvorhersehbar. Unsere Auspizien sagen einen massiven Kollaps der Wurzelstruktur voraus."
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure."

traits.locale_text: "Leider nein, Lord Captain. Die Gräber befinden sich unter zahlreichen Schichten von Zarkovs Wurzelsystem, das einen robusten Schild bildet. Es würde Monate dauern, ihn zu durchbrechen ... sofern das überhaupt möglich ist. Und selbst wenn es uns gelingt, bleiben die Konsequenzen für Zarkov aufgrund der Komplexität des Wurzelsystems unvorhersehbar. Unsere Auspizien sagen einen massiven Kollaps der Wurzelstruktur voraus."

languages.text: "Maalesef hayır Lord Kaptan. Mezarlar, Zarkov'un sağlam bir kalkan oluşturan kök sisteminin birçok katmanının altına gömülü. Onu yıkmak aylar sürer. Tabii bu mümkünse. Başarılı olsak bile iç içe geçmiş köklerin karmaşık sistemi nedeniyle Zarkov'un kendisi için sonuçlar öngörülemez kalmaya devam ediyor. Uzgörenler, kök yapısında devasa bir çöküş öngörüyor."
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure."

traits.locale_text: "Maalesef hayır Lord Kaptan. Mezarlar, Zarkov'un sağlam bir kalkan oluşturan kök sisteminin birçok katmanının altına gömülü. Onu yıkmak aylar sürer. Tabii bu mümkünse. Başarılı olsak bile iç içe geçmiş köklerin karmaşık sistemi nedeniyle Zarkov'un kendisi için sonuçlar öngörülemez kalmaya devam ediyor. Uzgörenler, kök yapısında devasa bir çöküş öngörüyor."

languages.text: « Malheureusement, non, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Les tombeaux sont enfouis sous plusieurs couches du système radiculaire de Zarkov, qui forment une barrière solide. Il nous faudrait des mois pour la percer, si c'est seulement possible. Même si nous réussissions, les conséquences que cela aurait sur Zarkov sont imprévisibles, en raison de la complexité de son système de racines entremêlées. Nos auspex prédisent un effondrement massif de la structure radiculaire. »
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately not, Lord Captain. The tombs are buried beneath many layers of Zarkov's root system, forming a solid shield. It will take us months at least to break through it — if that's even possible. Even if we were to succeed, the consequences for Zarkov itself remain unpredictable due to the complex system of intertwined roots. Our auspexes predict a massive collapse of the root structure."
